name: lua-agent-builder
description: Build, test, and deploy Lua AI agents (heylua.ai) from inside Codex CLI — 14 skills, 5 specialised subagents, MCP-first integrations to 250+ third-party services via Unified.to, sandbox-then-prod deploys with safety gates.
shortDescription: Build, test, and deploy Lua AI agents directly from Codex CLI.
